title: Implement mobile login, register, logout, and me endpoints
goal: Provide mobile-safe authentication endpoints compatible with React Native and Expo Go.
files_to_modify: Backend/routes/api.php if controller imports are needed
implementation_steps: Validate email as required email and password as required string.
On invalid credentials return 401 JSON with message 'The email address or password is incorrect.'.
Create Sanctum token named mobile_auth_token with the same 8-hour expiry pattern as current AuthController.
Return JSON containing user, token, expires_at, role, and role_label.
Validate name required, email required email unique, password required min:6.
Return 201 JSON containing message, user, role, and role_label.
Return current user, role, role_label, and allowed mobile features.
mobile_features_rules: All authenticated roles receive scan_books and view_book_details.
admin and librarian also receive view_borrowing_history.
acceptance_criteria: Mobile login works for seeded admin@library.com.
Mobile login works for seeded librarian@library.com.
Mobile login works for seeded borrower@library.com.
Mobile register creates a borrower account.
Borrower is returned with role_label User.
Mobile logout deletes only the current token.
Mobile me returns the current authenticated user.
No existing web AuthController behavior is broken.
verification: Use Postman or curl to POST /api/mobile/login with x-api-key.
POST /api/mobile/logout and confirm token no longer works.
